name: Wavy Stripe Beach Towel Black/White - Sun Squad™
description:
The Wavy Stripe Beach Towel from Sun Squad™ is essential for all your summer water activities. It is adorned with wavy black stripes on a white backdrop to add cute vibes to your beach gear. The lightweight beach towel is made of cotton in a terry weave that's perfect for spreading out on the sand while soaking up the sun, as well as wrapping around your waist after a quick dip in the pool.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
